name: Undertale | RPG
description:
In This Universe you replace Frisk and fall into the underground, having to face monsters, whether it be by sparing, killing, running away or by befriending them, you must find a way to leave this hell alive.

I spent around 5 hours on this bot, I tried my hardest since this is my first RPG bot, I will update this in the future most likely.
creator: Tayzzxri
